_doc: J16 (W4B-3) advice-consumption tunables — D7: the frozen position_exit_overlay.json is never amended; advice policy lives here. The owning-strategy rule itself is code (position_exit_overlay.evaluate_positions); these knobs shape which recorded urges count as fresh, consumable advice. The record->consume flip is CHAD_EXIT_ADVICE=consume — a SEPARATE operator GO gated on review of the ADVICE_WOULD_CLOSE corpus (D6 rider).
